=== proto/datatypes.h ===
/* Automatically generated header (sfdc 1.11f)! Do not edit! */

#ifndef PROTO_DATATYPES_H
#define PROTO_DATATYPES_H

#include <clib/datatypes_protos.h>

#ifndef _NO_INLINE
# if defined(__GNUC__)
#  ifdef __AROS__
#   include <defines/datatypes.h>
#  else
#   include <inline/datatypes.h>
#  endif
# else
#  include <pragmas/datatypes_pragmas.h>
# endif
#endif /* _NO_INLINE */

#ifdef __amigaos4__
# include <interfaces/datatypes.h>
# ifndef __NOGLOBALIFACE__
   extern struct DataTypesIFace *IDataTypes;
# endif /* __NOGLOBALIFACE__*/
#endif /* !__amigaos4__ */
#ifndef __NOLIBBASE__
  extern struct Library *
# ifdef __CONSTLIBBASEDECL__
   __CONSTLIBBASEDECL__
# endif /* __CONSTLIBBASEDECL__ */
  DataTypesBase;
#endif /* !__NOLIBBASE__ */

#endif /* !PROTO_DATATYPES_H */

#define DATATYPES_BASE_NAME DataTypesBase
#define _INLINE_DATATYPES_H 
#define __GNUC_STDC_INLINE__ 1
#define __INLINE_MACROS_H 
#define __INLINE_STUB_H 
#define __NO_INLINE__ 1
#define __USE_INLINE__ 1

=== probe assembly ===
#NO_APP
	.text
	.align	2
	.globl	_openvn_probe
_openvn_probe:
	link.w a5,#0
	clr.l -(sp)
	clr.l -(sp)
	pea 200.w
	pea 320.w
	clr.l -(sp)
	clr.l -(sp)
	move.l (16,a5),-(sp)
	clr.l -(sp)
	move.l (12,a5),-(sp)
	move.l (8,a5),-(sp)
	jsr _DrawDTObjectA
	lea (40,sp),sp
	unlk a5
	rts
